title: Eval integrity gate — trustworthy-signal sign-off
workstream: R1 (trustworthy eval harness — the global gate)
files_touched: scripts/ai/lib/eval_integrity.py (new — the gate ON the scorer + reference exec_scorer)
data/golden/tasks.json (new — seed golden set with good/bad references)
live_path_wired: trustworthiness_gate(scorer, golden, dir) runs four checks — discrimination (good>bad), determinism (variance bound), infra-abstention, and golden-set isolation — and returns a signed-off verdict. CLI: `python3 scripts/ai/lib/eval_integrity.py` exits 0 iff trustworthy. This is the orchestrator sign-off mechanized; NO downstream automation (R2 fine-tune, R4 shadow loop) may trust scores until a scorer passes.

test_evidence.unit: test-eval-integrity.py 7/7 — certifies the reference scorer; REJECTS non-discriminating (always-1.0), non-deterministic (random), and infra-noise-grading scorers; refuses to certify an agent-readable golden set (anti-gaming); exec_scorer abstains on noise + discriminates across json_parse/py_compile/keyword
test_evidence.live_finding: the CURRENT training-loop scorer (aq-local-training-loop._score_response) FAILS the gate: discrimination failed (can't rank good>bad on 3 golden tasks) + scores infra-noise as capability (5 cases). Mechanizes the 'false 0/12' finding — the reward signal in use is NOT trustworthy (issues-backlog HIGH; R1.2 must adopt exec_scorer).

activation_gate.on: gate + reference scorer RUNNABLE now (CLI + library); wiring it into the loop's own scorer certification is R1.2
activation_gate.observable: gate returns machine-readable JSON (discrimination/determinism/abstention/isolation); CLI exit code
activation_gate.intervenable: thresholds DETERMINISM_STDEV_MAX / DISCRIMINATION_MIN_MARGIN tunable; golden set + isolation marker under data/golden/

rollback: eval_integrity.py + data/golden/ are purely additive (new files); nothing in the running system depends on them yet. Remove to revert.
adopted_amendments_satisfied: amendment 1 (discrimination + determinism + infra-abstain + adversarial good/bad refs)
amendment 7 / antigravity (golden-test isolation — gate refuses to certify a readable golden set)
deferred: R1.2 (replace the loop's _score_response with exec_scorer so the loop's own signal passes the gate; run the gate at loop startup; block automation when uncertified). R1.1 golden CORPUS expansion (antigravity/codex design — this ships seed fixtures only). Shadow/canary datasets (R1.3 follow-up).
